topic.what: malicious security for garbled circuits on Bitcoin via cut-and-choose with polynomial label correlation
topic.how: uses Feldman VSS to correlate labels across N circuits as polynomial evaluations; adaptor signatures enable on-chain witness commitment that simultaneously reveals polynomial shares for label interpolation
topic.why_matters: enables trust-minimized Bitcoin bridges to verify arbitrary computation (Groth16 SNARK proofs) without on-chain computation while penalizing cheating provers

characteristics.evidence: probability all ℓ corrupted circuits avoid t-element challenge set is 1/C(N,ℓ)
characteristics.context: N=181 t=174 ℓ=7 for PFHG regime; N=44 t=22 ℓ=22 for compact tables

characteristics.what_it_measures: witness data posted on Bitcoin blockchain per input wire
characteristics.vs_baseline: one set of labels per unchallenged circuit (prohibitive)
characteristics.evidence: single Schnorr signature per Phase 2/3 wire regardless of number of unchallenged circuits
characteristics.context: Script inputs: (n2+n3)*(λσ+1) = 132*65 = 8580 bytes; SegWit discount yields ~2.4 kvB effective
well within Bitcoin standardness limits; SegWit discount reduces to ~2.4 kvB effective

characteristics.what_it_measures: off-chain data transfer between parties (PFHG regime)
characteristics.evidence: CommitMsg 231 MB + ResponseMsg 336 GB + AdaptorsMsg 2.1 MB
characteristics.context: dominated by garbled table transmission; table size |T| = 48 GB with PFHG 3B AND gates

characteristics.what_it_measures: off-chain data transfer between parties (compact tables regime)
characteristics.evidence: CommitMsg 30.4 MB + ResponseMsg 72.2 MB + AdaptorsMsg 2.1 MB
characteristics.context: compact tables |T|≈2MB enable much smaller communication; VSS machinery becomes dominant

characteristics.what_it_measures: time for garbler to generate all N garbled circuits
characteristics.vs_baseline: previous garbling libraries unable to handle billion-gate circuits
characteristics.context: N=181 tables with 48GB total; ckt library optimized for billion-gate scale

characteristics.what_it_measures: time for evaluator to evaluate unchallenged circuits
characteristics.context: ℓ=7 unchallenged circuits; worst case 21 min unlikely

characteristics.what_it_measures: time for garbler with compact tables
characteristics.evidence: N=44 balanced parameters with compact tables
characteristics.context: dramatic improvement from compact table work

characteristics.what_it_measures: time for evaluator with compact tables
characteristics.context: balanced parameters make evaluation faster than garbling due to small table size

characteristics.what_it_measures: circuit inputs known before protocol starts
characteristics.evidence: operator public key fixed for contract lifetime

characteristics.what_it_measures: circuit inputs fixed at Kickoff txid
characteristics.evidence: deposit index determines specific relation instance
characteristics.context: Phase 2 inputs x2 ∈ {0,1}^4; one adaptor per wire (known value)

characteristics.evidence: Groth16 proof bytes constituting witness w
